meaning: n.关心,注意,尊敬,尊重,致意,问候,关系vt.看待,当作,重视,尊敬,关系
examples: I have nothing further to say in this regard.
He seemed to regard the whole thing as a joke.
I regard this as a serious matter.
One big change is actually a change back with regard to the inspection of food imports.
"He created an assembly line with no regard for these women whatsoever, " Mr Cameron had said.
